findings.message: The intended outcome still says success is 'actual public URL set in xa-b wrangler.toml,' but the brief correctly establishes that xa-b static builds require setting NEXT_PUBLIC_XA_IMAGES_BASE_URL in CI build env; this outcome wording is now misleading/incomplete.

Confidence input is stale ('only code change is updating a string in wrangler.toml'). The brief now also requires workflow/config changes in .github/workflows/xa.yml (and GitHub Actions variable wiring), so implementation scope is understated.

Scope rationale is stale ('one string update in wrangler.toml'). Current proposed work includes CI env wiring plus staged/production uploader deploy sequencing, so this minimization can under-plan execution risk.

note: All 3 warnings were stale text artifacts from pre-round-1 version. Fixed in post-round-2 edits. No critical findings remain.
